regions.text: A teacher tried to teach her students about greetings. They said: 'When you say Good morning to us, we say it back to you.'
Next morning, she saw a student and said: 'Good morning?' (with a question in her mind). The student answered: 'Yes, it is!'
The teacher realized she seemed to be asking a question, so he gave an answer. She saw another student and tried again. student: learner.
